cards.back: A type of pattern classification algorithm that classifies a pattern into one of the predefined classes based on the minimum distance between the pattern and the prototype of the class.
A pattern or image that serves as a reference or template for classification, used in pattern classification by prototype matching algorithms.
A function that measures the distance between two points in a pattern space, used in minimum distance classifier to calculate the distance between the input pattern and the prototype.
The minimum distance between the input pattern and the prototype of a class, used in minimum distance classifier to classify the pattern into that class.
A pattern classification algorithm that classifies a pattern into one of the predefined classes by finding the closest prototype in the class to the input pattern, based on a distance metric.
